title: Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)

Dark Lords of the Sith'' |author=*[[Tom Veitch]] {{C|Original}}{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Dark-Lords-Tales/dp/1565111990|text=Star Wars: Dark Lords of the Sith: Tales of the Jedi}} *[[Kevin J. Anderson]] {{C|Original}} *[[John Whitman]]

{{C|Cassette}}` |rereleased=[[May 5]], [[2005]]
{{C|Compact disc}} |media type=*Cassette tape *Compact disc |run time=2 hours 15 minutes
(135 minutes) |discs=2 |cassettes=2 |pages= |isbn=9781565111998 |timeline=[[3997 BBY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |series=[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] |preceded by=[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] |followed by= }} '''''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith''''' is an audio drama adaptation of the ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith]]'' comic series written by [[Tom Veitch]] and [[Kevin J. Anderson]]. It was adapted by [[John Whitman]] and read by a full cast. The audiobook was first released on cassette tape by [[Time Warner AudioBooks]] in [[July]] [[1997]]. Later on [[May 5]], [[2005]] it was released on compact disc by [[HighBridge Audio]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Darth Vader was a Dark Lord of the Sith. Discover the terror of the Dark Lords who preceded him in this stunning sequel to Tales of the Jedi''. ''Ulic Qel-Droma and Nomi Sunrider and young Jedi Knights drawn into a battle for the survival of the Old Republic. But as the power of the evil Sith spreads across the galaxy, it threatens the existence of the Jedi themselves, and draws one of their greatest allies over to the dark side!'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot-link|Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith}} ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|soundcat=Audio files from Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio)}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9781565111998}}; [[July]] [[1997]]; [[Time Warner AudioBooks]]; Cassette tape *{{ISBN|9781565119741}}; [[May 5]], [[2005]]; [[HighBridge Audio]]; Compact disc ===Cover gallery=== File:SW_TotJ_DLotS_AudioCDCover_Highres.jpg|CD cover File:TotJ-DLotSCassetteCover.jpg|Cassette cover File:TotJ-DLotSCassetteBack.jpg|Cassette back File:TotJ-DLotSCassetteInner.jpg|Cassette inner cover ==Credits== {{Credits |cast= *'''[[John Cygan]]''' as '''[[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]]''' *'''[[Glynnis Talken Campbell|Glynnis Talken]]''' as '''[[Nomi Sunrider]]''' *'''[[Jim Ward (voice actor)|Jim Ward''']]''' as '''[[Arca Jeth]]''' *'''[[Peter Renaday|Peter Reneday]]''' as '''[[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]]''' *'''[[Jack Noseworthy]]''' as '''[[Cay Qel-Droma]]''' *'''[[Jocelyn Blue]]''' as '''[[Aleema Keto]]''' *'''[[Philip Clarke]]''' as '''[[Freedon Nadd]]''' |crew= *Written by '''[[John Whitman]]''' *Based on the story by '''[[Tom Veitch]]''', '''[[Kevin J. Anderson]]''' *Directed by '''[[Arthur G. Insana]]''' *Produced by '''Arthur G.
